snapshotPurpose: V1-candidate durable user-data baseline for vN-1 to vN migration validation.

appSettings.migrationRule: Older readable settings are normalized and rewritten to the current settings version; unreadable settings remain untouched on disk.
appSettings.coverage: Representative full overlay settings surface for all v0.19.0 overlay ids plus an unknown-field tolerance sample.

sharedOverlayContract.migrationRule: Shared defaults are source-controlled. User-local settings store resolved option values through app settings.

history.migrationRule: Summaries are canonical and migrate first. Aggregates are rebuilt from compatible summaries. Future, corrupt, or unsupported summaries remain on disk and are skipped.
history.storageMaterialization: Tests copy schema samples into app-style car/track/session paths derived from combo keys before running current history readers.

trackMaps.migrationRule: Runtime readers accept supported schemas. Complete maps are reused until schema or generation changes, confidence is improved, or the user forces regeneration.
trackMaps.storageMaterialization: Tests copy the schema sample to the app-generated map filename derived from track identity before running current map readers.

rawCapture.migrationRule: Raw captures are immutable diagnostics. New tools should branch by manifest format/schema metadata instead of rewriting raw capture folders.

runtimeState.migrationRule: Runtime state is diagnostic and disposable. It may be ignored or overwritten when incompatible.

requiredValidation: Current app settings code loads and preserves the full-overlay settings snapshot.
Current app settings code tolerates unknown future JSON fields without corrupting known settings.
Current shared overlay contract parser reads the frozen v0.19.0 shared defaults snapshot.
Current history maintenance accepts compatible v0.19.0 summary samples and rebuilds current aggregates after materializing app-style paths.
Current track-map store reads the generated map sample as a supported runtime map after materializing app-style paths.
Current diagnostic readers can parse raw-capture manifest/schema and runtime-state snapshots.
Current browser review settings UI maps the frozen release settings into the expected overlay controls.
Current localhost overlay model builders map the frozen release settings into the expected overlay output.
Current native overlay consumers map the frozen release settings into the expected overlay output.
